channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump's outsider Cabinet picks are rapidly gaining support for confirmation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — One by one, all the president-elect’ s men, and women, are falling into place in his Cabinet.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NYC mayor: More beds for mentally ill people, more cops on subways
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- With more NYPD officers heading into the subway system during the overnight hours, New York City Mayor Eric Adams said he is also looking to get mentally ill homeless people off the trains with a new option.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Who is Trump's attorney general pick Pam Bondi? The former prosecutor is a close Trump ally
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump's pick to lead the Justice Department, Pam Bondi, faced questions on Capitol Hill Wednesday over her loyalty to the Republican president-elect, who has vowed to use the agency to pursue revenge on his perceived political enemies.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Montana House endorses transgender bathroom ban affecting fellow lawmakers
item.description: Montana’s House is has endorsed a ban on transgender people using bathrooms in public buildings that don’t align with their sex assigned at birth.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Schoenbaum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Vivek Ramaswamy, an Ohio native, is interested in filling Vance's old Senate seat, AP source says
item.description: Former Republican presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy has expressed interest in the Ohio U.S. Senate seat that was vacated by Vice President-elect JD Vance, two people with direct knowledge of the biotech entrepreneur's wishes told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: End to daylight saving time among bills for 2025 Nevada Legislature
item.description: A Republican lawmaker who represents parts of six rural Nevada counties is sponsoring a bill to take the state off daylight saving time — one of the 200 bills written so far.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump's pick for budget director won't say whether he would release Ukraine aid
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Russell Vought, President-elect Donald Trump’s nominee for White House budget director, declined Wednesday to fully commit to doling out congressionally approved funds, specifically U.S. military aid to Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump inauguration will reportedly include Muslim cleric who refused to condemn Hezbollah as terror org
item.description: Husham Al-Husainy, a Muslim cleric from Michigan, was reportedly tapped to deliver a benediction at President-elect Trump's inauguration after a series of controversial remarks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Marco Rubio warns China is America's 'biggest threat,' affirms value of NATO alliance
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Florida Sen. Marco Rubio on Wednesday painted a dark vision of the consequences of America's “unbalanced relationship” with China, echoing President-elect Donald Trump's anti-globalist rhetoric as he vies to be confirmed as his secretary of state.
item.dc:creator: FARNOUSH AMIRI, DIDI TANG and MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New polls show Biden leaving office with approval ratings still buried deep in negative territory
item.description: President Biden's approval ratings remain well underwater as he is just days from leaving office, and the surveys suggest that many Americans see his time in the White House as a failure.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rubio vows to place US interests 'above all else' as Trump's top diplomat
item.description: Florida Sen. Marco Rubio promised on Wednesday to implement President-elect Donald Trump’s “America First” vision as secretary of state, vowing in his confirmation hearing that the incoming administration will forge a new path by placing American interests “above all else.
item.dc:creator: FARNOUSH AMIRI and MATTHEW LEE Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Florida's Rubio and Bondi face confirmation hearings
item.description: Former state attorney general and Tampa native Pam Bondi and Senator Marco Rubio are set to appear on Capitol Hill for confirmation hearings, Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: DFLer Doron Clark, Republican Abigail Wolters win primary in Senate District 60 special election
item.description: A special primary election Tuesday narrowed the field of candidates running for a Minnesota Senate seat from nine to two.
item.dc:creator: MPR News Staff, MPR News

item.title: County Board of Supervisors votes to hold special election to fill District 1 seat
item.description: In a swift and unanimous vote, the County Board of Supervisors has agreed to a special election to fill the vacancy left behind by Nora Vargas.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Vara, Fox 5

item.title: Biden's education chief says he avoided 'culture wars' despite goading from GOP governors
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — While Republican states were working to limit school history lessons and ban transgender athletes, President Joe Biden’s education chief says he was focused on what matters: putting more social workers in schools, expanding summer school and building a pipeline of new teachers.
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Capitol chaos: DeSantis faces backlash from Florida lawmakers over special session
item.description: Desantis says the state needs new laws to help President Trump carry out his immigration reforms in Florida. But there's some disagreement over that special session.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden announces 2 new national monuments in California after wildfires scuttled previous event
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In an announcement postponed by the Los Angeles wildfires, President Joe Biden on Tuesday designated two sites in California as national monuments that will honor Native American tribes while shielding picturesque mountains and deserts from mining and energy development.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Speaker Johnson orders US Capitol flags raised to full height for Trump's inauguration
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson on Tuesday ordered that flags at the U.S. Capitol be raised to their full height on Inauguration Day, pausing a 30-day flag-lowering order following the death of former President Jimmy Carter.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nevada elections leader urges real-time efficiency over changing deadlines
item.description: The influx of mail-in ballots collected on Election Day led to delays in tabulation across Nevada, not the number of ballots received in the days after, Democratic Nevada Secretary of State Cisco Aguilar said ahead of the legislative session.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Hegseth beats back blows from Democrats in blistering hearing: 5 takeaways
item.description: Pete Hegseth, President-elect Trump's choice for Defense secretary, on Tuesday emerged largely unscathed from an at times blistering confirmation hearing before the Senate Armed Services Committee.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gov. Murphy lays out ambitious goals in State of the State address
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (PIX11) - Gov. Phil Murphy on Tuesday delivered his State of the State address for the last time with a full year at the helm ahead of him.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Democrats' hopes of derailing Trump nominees fading fast
item.description: Democrats' hopes of defeating any of President-elect Trump's Cabinet nominees appear to be fizzling as Senate committees prepare for the first week of hearings.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Senate GOP incumbents brace for MAGA primary challengers
item.description: Several GOP Senate incumbents are already staring down the threat of primary challenges next year as friction builds between the MAGA and establishment wings. Sen.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Live updates: Democrats turn up heat on Hegseth as Republican alleges hypocrisy
item.description: Defense Secretary nominee Pete Hegseth appeared before the Senate Armed Services Committee on Tuesday, the first of President-elect Trump's Cabinet candidates to face confirmation.
item.dc:creator: The Hill staff, Fox 5

item.title: Senate District 60 primary results: 9 candidates running in election to decide control of the Minnesota Senate
item.description: The recent death of Minneapolis state Sen. Kari Dziedzic left a 33-33 tie in the Minnesota Senate. A primary for her seat set for Tuesday features seven DFLers and two Republicans. The primary winners from each party will face each other in a Jan. 28 election.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Alvarez, MPR News

item.title: Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo raises $3.4 million in 2024 for re-election bid
item.description: Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo is off to a strong start in building campaign funds, raising about $3.4 million over the past year, according to mandatory campaign filing reports.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Special counsel in Hunter Biden case denounces president for criticism of the probe
item.description: In a final report on his investigation, special counsel David Weiss said President Biden's criticism "undermines the very foundation of what makes America's justice system fair and equitable.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: Biden: Govt. to give $770 to each resident affected by LA wildfires
item.description: President Joe Biden convened senior officials to discuss the federal response to the LA County fires.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota Senate District 60 special election
item.description: Minnesota Senate District 60 is holding a special election to fill the vacancy left by DFL Sen. Kari Dziedzic who died last month.
item.dc:creator: MPR News

item.title: Key Republican says he will support Gabbard as Trump DNI pick
item.description: Sen. James Lankford (R-Okla.) said in a Sunday interview that he will support President-elect Donald Trump’s pick for director of national intelligence, former Rep. Tulsi Gabbard (Hawaii).
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Judge who blocked release of Trump report was 'plainly' wrong, special counsel tells appeals court
item.description: The Justice Department has asked a federal appeals court to move swiftly in reversing a judge’s order that had blocked the agency from releasing any part of special counsel Jack Smith’s investigative report on Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: ACLU sues Gov. DeSantis on behalf of Florida voters over special elections
item.description: The American Civil Liberties Union is suing Gov. Ron DeSantis for not calling special elections for state House and Senate seats.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Nevada's Cortez Masto to reintroduce bill to fund fight against wildfires
item.description: In the wake of the devastating California wildfires, Nevada Democratic Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto plans to reintroduce a proposal in Congress to better fund fire departments, interagency coordination and recovery efforts.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News
